sizing_rule.note: Geometric threshold technique (Vince method) scales from 1 to 2 contracts on equity growth. Asymmetric: scales up on equity growth but does NOT reduce back to 1 contract on drawdown when holding >2 contracts. Specific threshold values not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Use geometric threshold technique to determine at what equity level to increase from 1 contract to 2 contracts, but do not trim back contracts on the downside when below the geometric threshold if trading more than 2 contracts.
